data.body: Sixth review PASS advisory disposition: declined duplicate untracked-file findings f943cd93c0119533e/fd14f4fb1b4fdfff5 because the approved precondition is a clean tickets tracker and git status intentionally treats arbitrary untracked files as non-clean; sanctioned tracker scratch is excluded during init. Accepted fc4b68e4fda3df0ab as implementation test detail: test_plan_relation_snapshot must name duplicate-edge collapse and both prerequisite directions. The P6 clean wording has an exact command-level oracle in the implementation. Declined f77f0d83c629fcb75 because the epic feature branch is not deployed until 75de adds the rollback flag. Declined f02921d2c847e14d4 because existing review duration/call metrics cover successful-path latency while this story adds structured failure logs. PASS has no blocking findings.
